interpretation: cos_direct_related_mean: how close the QA-format and QD-related representations are (higher = more integration). shift_*_mean: L2 distance from baseline per prompt type. direct_over_related_shift_ratio: >1 suggests editing hits the QA (direct) representation more than the QD (related) representation -- format-coupling signature.
